name: smithly
description: Local desktop operator app for managing software projects with AI workers under human supervision.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/copy-storage-assets.mjs && node scripts/copy-desktop-assets.mjs
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage
scripts.clean: rm -rf coverage dist node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules
